message:
fix(sync): mutex wakeup, notify module restructure, rwlock Deref, semaphore pub

mutex.rs:
  Change unlock to clone the front waiter's waker instead of
  pop_front(). The waiter is left in the queue so the acquiring
  poll() can find and remove it, preventing a race where the
  waker is consumed but the waiter never re-polls (lost wakeup).

notify.rs:
  Move notify_bug_test from a top-level mod.rs entry to an inline
  #[cfg(test)] #[path] module inside notify.rs, keeping the test
  co-located with the code it exercises.

notify_bug_test.rs:
  Replace the high-level Notify integration test with a focused
  WaiterSlab unit test that verifies stale free-slot indices are
  discarded after tail shrink, exercising the slab reuse path
  directly.

mod.rs:
  Remove standalone notify_bug_test module declaration (now inline).
  Change semaphore visibility from pub(crate) to pub.

rwlock.rs:
  Add Deref impl for OwnedRwLockReadGuard, matching the existing
  Deref on the non-owned RwLockReadGuard.

rwlock_lost_wakeup_test.rs:
  Formatting/structural adjustments to the lost wakeup test.

rwlock_my_bug_test.rs:
  Removed — the bug it tested is now covered by the lost wakeup
  test and the mutex fix above.

semaphore.rs:
  Add OwnedAcquireFuture::new_uncancelable constructor for use
  when no Cx is available (e.g., concurrency limiter fallback).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
